name: conai
description: React-based image viewer and manager for ComfyUI

scripts.dev: concurrently --raw --kill-others "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:full: npm run build:integrated && npm run build:bundle && npm run build:portable
scripts.build:all: npm run build:integrated && npm run build:bundle && npm run build:portable && npm run build:docker
scripts.deploy:docker:build: npm run build:integrated && npm run build:bundle && npm run build:docker && cd build-output/docker && docker-compose up --build -d
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf shared/dist frontend/dist backend/dist frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules shared/node_modules node_modules build-output
scripts.db:reset: rm -f database/*.db && cd backend && npm run db:migrate
scripts.verify:migration: npm run verify:policy:active-source && npm run verify:no-banned-imports:phase2 && npm run verify:no-ui-signatures:active && npm run verify:no-mui-deps:strict
scripts.verify:migration:full: npm run verify:migration && npm run verify:policy:generated-artifact && npm run verify:no-ui-signatures:generated && npm run verify:no-ui-signatures:full
